headline: $1B Gaming Giants Seek Sports Betting Ban

article.title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
article.summary: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

headline: Crypto-Backed GOP Candidate Wins Alabama Senate Runoff Tonight

article.title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
article.summary: Several more US states are scheduled to hold primaries next week after one Republican candidate won in Alabama on Tuesday after a crypto company-backed PAC used what it called its “biggest spend of the cycle.”

headline: $1B SpaceX Boost Eyed for FTX Creditors

headline: Nvidia AI Robots Spark $10B Crypto Rally
